repo.name: Tasker
repo.description: Repository for direct-purchase version of tasker. an application for Android which performs tasks (sets of actions) based on contexts (application, time, date, location, event, gesture) in user-defined profiles or in clickable or timer home screen widgets. https://tasker.joaoapps.com/ NOTE: Tasker is a closed source and requires a purchased license to work.

application.name: AutoBarcode
application.desc: Scan, create, and manage barcodes and QR codes with Tasker integration for seamless automation.
application.author: joaomgcd

application.name: AutoInput
application.desc: Automate your device's user interface with Tasker integration, enabling clicks, swipes, text input, and more for seamless automation.
application.author: joaomgcd

application.name: AutoLaunch
application.desc: Launch apps, shortcuts, and activities with Tasker integration and advanced options for automation.
application.author: joaomgcd

application.name: AutoLocation
application.desc: Advanced location-based triggers and geofencing with Tasker integration for powerful automation.
application.author: joaomgcd

application.name: AutoNotification
application.desc: Create, intercept, and customize Android notifications with advanced buttons, replies, and triggers for powerful Tasker automation.
application.author: joaomgcd

application.name: AutoShare
application.desc: Share content between apps, devices, and the web with Tasker integration and advanced sharing options for automation.
application.author: joaomgcd

application.name: AutoTools
application.desc: A powerful suite of tools and plugins for Tasker, enabling advanced automation with UI customization, file management, and more.
application.author: joaomgcd

application.name: Tasker
application.desc: Tasker is an application for Android which performs tasks (sets of actions) based on contexts (application, time, date, location, event, gesture)
application.author: joaomgcd
